definition:
1. to scrape  or grate: to tickle : metaphorically, of love, to nettle, chafe, irritate , (Herdotus Historicus); of satiety, (Pindar); of anxiety, (Herdotus Historicus), etc.; οὐ κνίσω τὸ ῥῆμ᾽ ἕκαστον will  not attack  every word, (Aristophanes Comicus):—;Pass., κνίζεσθαί τινος to be stung  (with love) for  one, (Theocritus Poeta Bucolicus) 
2. κν. ὀργάν to provoke  anger, (Pindar) (ML)
